starting feature work. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`, `npm test`, `npm run demo`, and `npm run test:pack` are green
- [ ] Tests still run fully offline (no real API key required anywhere)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or: agreed in issue #___)
- [ ] Where behavior was ambiguous, I chose the fail-closed side
- [ ] No keys, tokens, private endpoint URLs, or request/response bodies are included
- [ ] Docs updated if config schema, endpoints, or error shapes changed
      (`docs/configuration.md` / `docs/api.md`)
